title: MAMA UNWRAPS CAMERA — happy tears, family hug
prompt: Medium close-up in the cozy anniversary living room — twinkling fairy lights, beige sectional couch in soft background, coffee table in foreground. @mama_with_camera kneeling at the coffee table holding the new black-and-silver video camera in both hands at chest height. Mouth GASPS open, eyes FILL with happy tears. mama_with_camera (voice trembling joy): "You... you got me a CAMERA!" @Papa wraps arms around her on the couch, @Sara hugs from one side, @Eva hugs from other. All smiling and emotional.
